subcodes.first_line: Say: O my God and God of the world, my Lord and Lord of nations! I beseech Thee by the Name which, when it appeared, was uplifted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل یا الهی و اله العالم و مالکی و مالک الامم اسئلک بالاسم الذی اذا ظهر ارتفع
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @rejection, opposition and persecution
